name: The Fool
description: The pinnacle of possibilities and potential. Indicates an abundance of choices but hints at a lack of information or experience. A reminder to trust instincts in the absence of learned knowledge. [cite: 5, 11]

name: Magician
description: A being of action, concentration, and power. Represents the one who understands the workings and powers of all four suits (human identities). [cite: 23, 30, 31]

name: High Priestess
description: The feminine counterpart to the Magician; quiet and contemplative. Suggests a time of stillness, investigation, and delving into underlying truths. [cite: 41, 44, 45]

name: Empress
description: The embodiment of pleasure and abundance in all forms. Represents mothering, birth, and oneness with the planet. Her bounty should be shared, not coveted. [cite: 56, 57, 58, 60]

name: Emperor
description: Stern, direct, and rigid. Creates order from chaos through rules, organization, and responsibility. Essential for the fluid function of any system. [cite: 69, 72, 75]

name: Hierophant
description: Symbolizes a call to be part of something greater through shared beliefs and teamwork. Represents the power of eternal ideas passed down through groups. [cite: 84, 85, 88, 89]

name: Lovers
description: Represented by the red string of fate that binds souls. Symbolizes opposing but attractive forces and the choice between two different paths. [cite: 100, 106]

name: Chariot
description: The embodiment of victory after struggle. Represents mastering oneself and harnessing surrounding powers to achieve goals. [cite: 117, 121]

name: Strength
description: True strength lies in conviction and the effort to understand the 'other' rather than aggression. Protection of the misunderstood. [cite: 135, 138, 140]

name: Hermit
description: Willingly setting oneself apart to seek truths obscured by civilization. Values internal growth over physical concerns. [cite: 153, 155]

name: Destiny
description: An unknowable force beyond human control. Replaces the Wheel of Fortune. Represents life-altering events and the weaving of collective fate. [cite: 169, 170, 176, 177]

name: Justice
description: The blind arbiter of truth. Calls us to put aside personal predilections and see actions through impartial eyes. [cite: 187, 189]

name: Hanged Man
description: Surrender of principle or will. Realization that some situations are won by losing. Taking an unexpected approach. [cite: 201, 202, 205]

name: Death
description: A synonym for change and the end of one chapter. Indicates the necessity of growth and flexibility to truly live. [cite: 221, 229]

name: Temperance
description: A unifying factor between extremes. Asks for moderation and control of desires so they do not harm others or oneself. [cite: 233, 239]

name: Devil
description: Twists good things like pride and affection into binding forces. Represents a 'willing prison' of beautiful but impermanent pleasures. [cite: 251, 257]

name: Tower
description: Unexpected and uncomfortable change. Symbolizes the possibility of a great realization (epiphany) from a sudden event. [cite: 268, 274]

name: Star
description: The bringer of light in the dark. Signals a positive turn of luck and illuminates the way, but hope must be followed by action. [cite: 291, 294, 297]

name: Moon
description: Asks us to view surroundings in a different light to gain power. A conduit of potential energy for those exploring psychic abilities. [cite: 315, 316, 317]

name: Sun
description: A card of self-assurance and confidence. Its light pierces shadow to reveal truth and enlighten intellectually. [cite: 332, 333]

name: Judgment
description: Culmination of actions and intentions. Calls for clarity on what people or projects are deserving of your time. [cite: 345, 351]

name: World
description: Conclusion of the Fool's journey. Represents a complete understanding of the human condition and equipped to start anew. [cite: 362, 363, 365]

name: Anant
description: Exists outside temporal constraints. Represents the cyclical nature of eternity where the end of one universe brings a new one. [cite: 376, 378, 382]

name: Ace of Wands
description: Bold step in a new direction; creative opportunity. [cite: 409, 412]

name: Two of Wands
description: Ambition in exploring the unknown; choice to stay or go. [cite: 422, 423]

name: Three of Wands
description: Leadership and forging the way for followers. [cite: 428, 429]

name: Four of Wands
description: Happiness after achieving freedom from mental or physical bonds. [cite: 438, 439, 440]

name: Five of Wands
description: Fierce competition or daily annoyances causing a sense of defeat. [cite: 446, 450]

name: Six of Wands
description: Success over an obstacle; enjoying victory and reputation. [cite: 453, 458, 459]

name: Seven of Wands
description: Protecting a firmly held belief or stance against opponents. [cite: 465, 466]

name: Eight of Wands
description: Time of sudden news requiring quick thinking and adaptive reactions. [cite: 471, 474]

name: Nine of Wands
description: Caution due to past abuse, but still standing and capable of recovery. [cite: 480, 482, 485]

name: Ten of Wands
description: Biting off more than one can chew; responsibilities are uneven. [cite: 489, 492]

name: Page of Wands
description: Traversing new frontiers; risk-taking mixed with preparedness. [cite: 501, 502, 504]

name: Knight of Wands
description: Drive and showmanship; caution against bravery without planning. [cite: 507, 509, 512]

name: Queen of Wands
description: Quiet assurance; a life brimming with active hobbies and interests. [cite: 516, 517, 518]

name: King of Wands
description: Rallying others through charisma; carving new paths with conviction. [cite: 522, 525]

name: Ace of Cups
description: Growing sense of compassion; love gives despite difficulties. [cite: 531, 538]

name: Two of Cups
description: Attraction or deep friendship based on trust; end to hostilities. [cite: 542, 545]

name: Three of Cups
description: Bonds of trust and shared burden; time of joy and relaxation. [cite: 547, 550, 553]

name: Four of Cups
description: Apathy or purposeful withdrawal for introspection and dreaming. [cite: 559, 562]

name: Five of Cups
description: Failure in projects or relationships; holding onto hope that it will pass. [cite: 567, 569]

name: Six of Cups
description: Fondness for childhood memories; caution against over-indulging in nostalgia. [cite: 573, 576]

name: Seven of Cups
description: Creativity but warns against indecision; dreams remain smoke without action. [cite: 584, 587, 589]

name: Eight of Cups
description: Outgrowing the old; leaving fulfilling pasts for new discoveries. [cite: 594, 595, 596]

name: Nine of Cups
description: A wish come true; reaping rewards and prosperity in social endeavors. [cite: 602, 605]

name: Ten of Cups
description: Emotional growth; past transgressions are forgiven for peace. [cite: 609, 614]

name: Page of Cups
description: Messages of love; nurturing potential friendship with uplifting spirit. [cite: 618, 621]

name: Knight of Cups
description: Sensitive dreamer; openness and limitless thinking vs delivery. [cite: 624, 626, 629]

name: Queen of Cups
description: Following heart and intuition; understanding others' emotional states. [cite: 635, 636]

name: King of Cups
description: Level-headedness and diplomacy; composure in stormy situations. [cite: 645, 646]

name: Ace of Swords
description: Dispelling confusion with pure intellect; cutting straight to facts. [cite: 653, 656]

name: Two of Swords
description: Situation requiring action; refusal to choose is still a choice. [cite: 660, 664]

name: Three of Swords
description: Unexpected loss; calling to heal and learn from heartbreak. [cite: 671, 675]

name: Four of Swords
description: Recharging from previous effort or preparing for upcoming stress. [cite: 680, 683]

name: Five of Swords
description: Taking advantage of others; behaviors that siphon life from groups. [cite: 690, 691]

name: Six of Swords
description: Lethargic pause while moving towards an unknown, gray future. [cite: 698, 703]

name: Seven of Swords
description: Subversive situation; loyalty and honor are absent. [cite: 709, 711]

name: Eight of Swords
description: Stressful environment; opportunity to come out stronger or be destroyed. [cite: 718, 720]

name: Nine of Swords
description: Loss of hope; dread that is perhaps more dream/mental than reality. [cite: 726, 732, 733]

name: Ten of Swords
description: Darkness before dawn; perseverance needed so the story doesn't end in dark. [cite: 737, 741]

name: Page of Swords
description: Facing problems head-on; seeking truth in the face of setbacks. [cite: 745, 749]

name: Knight of Swords
description: Excessive force through intellect; penetrating confusion by setting aside feelings. [cite: 754, 756]

name: Queen of Swords
description: Knowledge of the factual and empirical; truth can sometimes hurt. [cite: 763, 766]

name: King of Swords
description: Calculated and impartial; potential for harming oneself if only logical. [cite: 773, 776, 777]

name: Ace of Pentacles
description: Investment paid off; using manual labor to build a foundation. [cite: 781, 783]

name: Two of Pentacles
description: Balancing shifting attentions; warning of financial instability. [cite: 791, 793]

name: Three of Pentacles
description: Using each other's strengths; careful consideration and planning. [cite: 798, 802]

name: Four of Pentacles
description: Inability to move on; riches meant to be used, not dormant. [cite: 808, 810, 811]

name: Five of Pentacles
description: Temporary hard times in wealth or health; seeking help when necessary. [cite: 817, 819]

name: Six of Pentacles
description: One party has greater access; power used to dominate or give. [cite: 828, 829]

name: Seven of Pentacles
description: Reaching a goal/milestone; evaluate current position during rest. [cite: 833, 834, 838]

name: Eight of Pentacles
description: Continued effort required; advancing knowledge and pushing boundaries. [cite: 843, 845]

name: Nine of Pentacles
description: Upscale luxuries enjoyed for oneself, not for public bragging. [cite: 850, 853, 854]

name: Ten of Pentacles
description: Long-lasting wealth; focus on growing family, relations, and wisdom. [cite: 859, 861]

name: Page of Pentacles
description: Love for physical activity; initiative leads to success. [cite: 867, 869, 871]

name: Knight of Pentacles
description: Obsessive preparation; tenacity and stamina in work. [cite: 874, 878, 879]

name: Queen of Pentacles
description: Dependable in emotional need; practical use of the world. [cite: 884, 887]

name: King of Pentacles
description: Creation of opportunities; complete control over the material world. [cite: 894, 895]
